SECTION 3
------------------------------------------------------------
Environment
To provide feasible solutions to mitigate emissions from aviation and to reduce the noise due to aircraft movements in the airport vicinity.
SSP
State Safety Programme
Aerosports
Regulations and Guidelines
Know Your Rights
Protecting Passengers and the Public
What's New?
Regulation
Guidance
Announcements
Internship Program in Directorate General of Civil Aviation, Ministry of Civil Aviation
21/01/2026 | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.36 MB
Extension of Electronic Personnel License (EPL) for Issue and Renewal of ATPL (including IR), PPL and FRTOL-R
21/01/2026 | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.25 MB
Conduct of RTR Practical Examination by DGCA
27/12/2025 | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.12 MB
More
Highlights
ICAO honors DGCA for a safer civil aviation
03.10.2025 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Shri Faiz Ahmed Kidwai, Director General (Civil Aviation) received the ICAO Council President Certificate on 23rd September 2025 at a ceremony held at ICAO Montreal during the 42nd session of the Assembly. The certificate is in recognition of India's progress in establishing an effective aviation oversight system and for its ongoing commitment to the Implementation of ICAO Standards and Recommended Practices.
DGCA grants Aerodrome License to Navi Mumbai International Airport
30.09.2025 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Navi Mumbai International Airport was granted Aerodrome license on 30/09/2025 for Aerodrome Reference code “4F” with Runway length of 3700m and CAT-I Instrument Landing System (ILS) for All Weather Operations.
Accessibility Standards and Guidelines for Civil Aviation
03.01.2023 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Accessibility Standards and Guidelines for Civil Aviation
More
Online Services
eGCA
For Pilots, Aircraft, Operator, Aerodrome related services offered by DGCA
Pariksha
For examinations conducted by CEO, for AME and Flight crew
E-Sahaj
For Security Clearance from Ministry of Civil Aviation
Quick Links
Know Your Rights
IDERA (Rule 32A)
National Aviation Safety Plan
Announcements
Surveillance Programme 2024
Tenders
Scrap items list
13.08.2025 (12:00 AM) | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.73 MB
Inviting quotations for disposal of scrap items in DGCA.
24.10.2021 (12:30 AM) | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.73 MB
Notice Inviting Tender for procurement of Automatic Existent Gum Apparatus with Air Compressor for existent gum apparatus with air compressor for existent gum test in jet fuels.
18.01.2020 (06:00 PM) | Download (Type : pdf) | 0.73 MB
More

SECTION 6
------------------------------------------------------------
Highlights
ICAO honors DGCA for a safer civil aviation
03.10.2025 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Shri Faiz Ahmed Kidwai, Director General (Civil Aviation) received the ICAO Council President Certificate on 23rd September 2025 at a ceremony held at ICAO Montreal during the 42nd session of the Assembly. The certificate is in recognition of India's progress in establishing an effective aviation oversight system and for its ongoing commitment to the Implementation of ICAO Standards and Recommended Practices.
DGCA grants Aerodrome License to Navi Mumbai International Airport
30.09.2025 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Navi Mumbai International Airport was granted Aerodrome license on 30/09/2025 for Aerodrome Reference code “4F” with Runway length of 3700m and CAT-I Instrument Landing System (ILS) for All Weather Operations.
Accessibility Standards and Guidelines for Civil Aviation
03.01.2023 | Download (Type : jpg) | 0.24 MB
  Accessibility Standards and Guidelines for Civil Aviation
More
